Order Custom Backdrop Banners for Professional Trade Show Displays

This large banner frame (Slider) is a great alternative to standard pop up backwall displays. The Slider frame can adjust from an 81" to 120" width & 41.5" to 96" height display. Pole pockets are sewn on top and bottom of the fabric print. The frame is constructed out of 1.5" telescopic poles that slide, allowing multiple graphic sizes to be used on the display.

Frame Color: Black

Package Includes:

  • (1) Single Sided Graphic
  • (2) 4 1/2" Pole Pockets (Top and Bottom)
  • (1) Large Slider Frame
  • (1) Black Nylon Carry Bag

Upgrade option: Add 2 additional pole pockets to sides

Warranty: 1 Year on Graphic and Frame

Other Features:

  • Display Size: 96"W x 96"H
  • Graphic Size: 96"W x 94"H
  • Shipping Size: 41" x 5" x 4"
  • Banner Materials: Stretch Fabric, Dye-Sublimation
  • Weight: 16 lbs
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Fabric Material for Backdrop Banner Printing

With this product, you will receive the banner retractor hardware and a 48" to 96" w X 36" to 96" h banner.

Material Options

9 oz stretch fabric: Our high-quality 9oz stretch fabric material is the standard material we use for backdrop banner stands. The stretch fibers allow the fabric to stretch and retain its original shape after movement.

This durable fabric material provides excellent print quality for trade show displays, conferences, and professional events. The stretch properties ensure your backdrop banner maintains its professional appearance throughout extended use.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Backdrop Banner Stand Assembly

Your backdrop banner comes with professional finishing options designed for easy setup and maximum durability:

  • Pole Pockets: 4 1/2" pole pockets sewn on top and bottom for secure mounting
  • Optional Side Pockets: Add 2 additional pole pockets to sides for enhanced stability
  • Telescopic Frame: 1.5" adjustable poles that slide for multiple graphic sizes
  • Frame Color: Professional black finish
  • Carry Bag: Black nylon bag included for easy transport

All finishing is completed using industrial-grade materials to ensure your backdrop banner stand withstands frequent setup and breakdown at trade shows and events.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom Backdrop Banner Orders

At Banners.com, we offer flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from five to seven business days on this product. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need to order.

Production Time Tables

5 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fabric turnaround option. Free and fast enough for most custom orders

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given

7 Business Days Saver:

If you aren't in a hurry, you can save some money by choosing our 7 Day Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Backdrop Banner Stand Orders

All backdrop banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

For more information on check orders, contact our customer service team. Payment processing is secure and all orders are protected throughout the entire transaction process.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Backdrop Banner Stand Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 965-9300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1-3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping Guidelines

  • Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package
  • Additional shipping charges apply to large orders
  • After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages
  • We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package
  • Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds
  • If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent
  • Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7-10 business days after initial scheduled delivery

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM
PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Event Uses for Backdrop Banner Stands

Backdrop banner stands provide versatile display solutions for professional presentations and marketing events:

Trade Show Applications

  • Exhibition booth backdrops and displays
  • Product launch presentations
  • Corporate branding walls
  • Information displays and signage

Event & Conference Uses

  • Conference stage backdrops
  • Speaker presentation backgrounds
  • Registration area displays
  • Award ceremony backdrops

Commercial Applications

  • Retail store promotional displays
  • Photo booth backgrounds
  • Step and repeat photography walls
  • Corporate event branding

The adjustable frame design allows for easy customization and setup in various venue configurations, making it ideal for businesses that participate in multiple events throughout the year.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Backdrop Banner Printing

File Specifications

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

We've provided you with design templates to help design the banner to your specs.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Design Templates Available

  • 8' x 8' EPS and PDF templates
  • 8' x 10' EPS and PDF templates
  • Setup instructions and specifications
PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Your Custom Backdrop Banner Stand Today

Ready to create a professional backdrop display for your next trade show or event? Our backdrop banner stands combine durability, portability, and professional appearance to showcase your brand effectively.

Why Choose Our Backdrop Banner Stands

  • Adjustable Design: Frame adjusts from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height
  • Professional Quality: High-quality 9oz stretch fabric with dye-sublimation printing
  • Easy Transport: Includes black nylon carry bag for convenient setup
  • Versatile Mounting: Pole pocket construction for secure banner attachment
  • Complete Package: Banner and hardware included in one order

Our experienced team will work with you to create the perfect backdrop banner for your specific needs. Whether you need a single display or multiple units for a large exhibition, we have the capacity and expertise to deliver professional results on time.

Choose from our template designs, upload your own artwork, or let our professional design team create a custom backdrop banner that represents your brand perfectly.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Stand Questions & Answers

What is a backdrop banner stand?

A backdrop banner stand, also known as a backdrop stand or a backdrop display, is a portable and adjustable frame designed to hold and display large fabric or vinyl banners. It provides a sturdy structure to showcase banners in a vertical orientation, creating a visually appealing backdrop for various events, trade shows, conferences, photo shoots, or stage presentations.

What materials can my artwork be printed on?

Your artwork is available to be printed on this great material: 9 oz stretch fabric

Can I swap banners in the backdrop banner stand?

Yes, backdrop banner stands are designed to allow for easy swapping of banners. To swap banners, simply remove the existing banner from the stand and replace it with the new one. This versatility allows you to use the same backdrop stand for different events or update your promotional messages and graphics as needed.

Do you offer different sizes for the backdrop banner stand?

Yes, we offer a variety of different sizes for our backdrop banner stands. We offer the following sizes for our Backdrop Stands Range of products:

  • Backdrop Banner Stand: 8' X 8' and 8' X 10'

Can I order the Backdrop Banner Stand hardware separately?

Yes, you can order backdrop banner stand hardware separately. If you already have a banner but need the stand or if you have a damaged or lost stand and require a replacement, ordering the hardware separately can be our convenient solution to you.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
